name: PM Work-Order Closeout
description: Validate maintenance completion evidence, resident communication state, invoice readiness, and PropertyMeld closeout notes before final close.

stages.name: Verify Completion Evidence
stages.description: Confirm the work order has enough evidence to support closeout.

steps.title: Collect completion evidence
steps.instructions: Collect completion notes, technician/vendor updates, required photos, resident confirmation state, and any open parts or return-trip notes.
steps.dispatch_body: Gather internal closeout evidence for the work order. Do not close external systems.

steps.title: Review closeout evidence
steps.instructions: Confirm evidence is sufficient for closeout, or return the work order for missing proof.
steps.human_prompt: Review work-order completion evidence before closeout is staged.

stages.name: Prepare Closeout
stages.description: Draft closeout notes and financial follow-up without changing live external state.

steps.title: Draft closeout note
steps.instructions: Draft the PropertyMeld closeout note with completion summary, resident impact, vendor result, photos referenced, and unresolved caveats.
steps.dispatch_body: Prepare internal closeout note text; do not update PropertyMeld.

steps.title: Flag invoice readiness
steps.instructions: Check whether invoice review, owner billing approval, warranty coding, or vendor payment follow-up is needed before final closure.
steps.dispatch_body: Prepare internal invoice readiness notes for closeout.

stages.name: Approve Final Close
stages.description: Gate final closeout and record the result.

steps.title: Closeout approval gate
steps.instructions: Approve final closeout only after completion evidence, resident state, and invoice readiness are acceptable.
steps.human_prompt: Approval required before final work-order closeout.

steps.title: Record closeout audit note
steps.instructions: Record the approval source, closeout rationale, open exceptions, and next audit checkpoint in the workflow event trail.
